title: Create: Hypertubes
description: Travel arround the world with tubes!
body:
![Mod Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb59b6c540193d571bea31da0422deb386069285.png)

***

# Create: Hypertubes

**This mod is currently in active development and is compatible with both Create 0.5.1 and 6.0.x. Features may change, and bugs are expected. Please report any issues on my GitHub!**

### Welcome to Create: Hypertubes!

Ever wanted to build a transportation network in Minecraft similar to ones in Satisfactory? Create: Hypertubes is an addon for the Create mod, inspired by Satisfactory Hypertubes, allowing you to construct intricate and seamless tube systems for moving players and entities with ease. Hypertubes offer a new way to travel in your Minecraft world.

With an intuitive building system, you can design elegant and fun hypertubes with many curves to travel through, or build long, efficient straightaway tubes to power your logistics network! The options are limitless.

***

## Traveling

![Traveling](https://i.imgur.com/UccmHvR.gif)

Jump into a **Hypertube Entrance** and and be thrown across your world

(You can enable FPV in the config files)
***

## Placing Tubes
![Placing Tubes](https://i.imgur.com/dSYjOp0.gif)

The components are designed to integrate smoothly into your existing Create progression, making it easy to get your Hypertube network up and running. Getting your network running is as simple as it gets: just power a **Hypertube Entrance** with a cogwheel and you're ready to go.

***

## Hypertube Entrance Modes
![Entrance Modes](https://i.imgur.com/LuZMB7T.gif)

You can modify the **Hypertube Entrance** with a **wrench** to select your preferred mode!
If you're using **Automatic Lock Mode**, you can **sneak** to avoid being pulled into the tube

***

## Fish and Villagers 
![Fish and Villagers](https://i.imgur.com/wYWdRG9.gif)

With **version 0.2.0**, **fish** and **villagers** can now travel through the tubes!
Just turn on **Automatic Lock Mode** and watch them go :)

(Experimental! you can disable this in the config files)

***

## Visual customization
![Customization](https://i.imgur.com/NoL1ZWZ.gif)

You can customize tube connections just by using a **Wrench**!

(This is just the first step toward the customization milestone, any suggestions or help are welcome!)

***

## Automatization


Gif not yet available!


You can automatize tube behavior or detects travellers with Attachments!

***

### Planned Features:

*  [   ] Colored tubes ands customizations
*  [X] Tube Accelerator
*  [   ] Tube Splitter/Junction
*  [X] Hypertube Cannon (Ficsit aproves)
*  [X] Fish will be able to travel through the tubes 🦈
*  [X] Redstone Automation
*  [X] And the other mobs will be able too!

### We Need Your Feedback!

This mod is a work in progress, and your feedback is crucial! If you encounter any bugs or have suggestions for new features, please let me know:

*   [github.com/PedroRok/CreateHypertubes/issues](https://github.com/PedroRok/CreateHypertubes/issues) - Report bugs and suggest features here!

### Want to support the project?

If you enjoyed this project and appreciate my work, feel free to support me, it really helps me keep going ❤️

*   [ko-fi.com/pedrorok](https://ko-fi.com/pedrorok) - Every donation makes a difference!
